name: wildcard-runtime-with-showtext-snapshot
description: Wildcard/dynamic-prompt node whose live text is generated at RUNTIME (not in the graph) but a downstream ShowText holds the queue-time snapshot — the snapshot must be used, and the wildcard TEMPLATE (with __wildcards__) must not leak into the result.

inputs.populated_text: masterpiece, best quality, 1girl, twin braids, sailor uniform, rooftop, sunset sky

inputs.text_0: masterpiece, best quality, 1girl, twin braids, sailor uniform, rooftop, sunset sky

inputs.text: worst quality, low quality, lowres, bad anatomy, watermark, username
